title: Better Pinger
description: Better Pinger enhances how people view server list pings.
body:
# Better Pinger
Better Pinger is a mod mainly focused on making the pings more understandable and having a  modern theme. We also include high contrast versions and light-mode versions, With a expanding varitey of choices, you can pick the version you want that fits you. 

## Images
![Full Ping on a server list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a40f3139a72ffef06a21cd65a5a37415d5a3a73.png)
![Cant connect on server list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24f18ca5255d9655738888daac518ca7837a9f26_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Terms of Use & License</summary>

You are 100% allowed to add this to any modpack wether that is a public one or a private one. However you are not allowed on modify or rediestrubute the resource on any external platform than modrinth. If you are subject to copyright of this resource your resource might be reported on such platform. Full license terms are listed within the modpack.


Disclaimer: Due to modrinths content rules, I have to disclaim that this resource does not boost how much ping you get or how good your ping is.
